creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Looking for a laidback destination in Dubai? Check out Palm West Beach! 

💙 insta-worthy spots
💙 vibrant atmosphere 
💙 awesome restaurants where you can lounge and dine
💙 beach with a view of Dubai Marina skyline

No entrance fee.

How to get there by public transportation?
🚕 Option 1: Take a taxi from Dubai Internet City metro station
🚶🏻‍♀️ Option 2: Ride the monorail and walk from Al Ittihad Park monorail station. 

Tag your besties and save this for your Dubai trip.
